name: first-citizen-toolbelt
description: Hands for a headless Claude agent that plays Seize the Seas as a rules-subject player. Each tool does ONE thing and prints clean JSON to stdout. All trading is DRY until the founder funds the wallet and sets CITIZEN_ALLOW_LIVE=1.

tools.name: init-wallet
tools.purpose: create/show the dedicated wallet address to fund

tools.name: wallet
tools.purpose: show address + ETH/USDC/Money/coin balances + funded/live status

tools.name: scan-gaps
tools.purpose: live ranked market-gap list (read-only); shared with the Port Report

tools.name: trade
tools.purpose: plan (DRY) / execute one small gap-closing buy; live needs CITIZEN_ALLOW_LIVE=1

tools.name: convert-winnings
tools.purpose: income→build: Guard cbBTC winnings → GOLD via cbBTC→USDC→Money→GOLD; threshold-batch at $10 (not the $0.25 gap rail); DRY by default

tools.name: pawns
tools.purpose: command-picture: pawns under command across wallets (read-only); summary by default

tools.name: fight
tools.purpose: INCOME ENGINE: issue-seed → play the bilge fight headlessly (game's own squad AI) → server verify-fight → would-claim. Skill-based: declines a fight it would lose; never fakes a win. Loot payout is founder-gated (flagged, no tx). 'issue' still pins a seed only.

tools.name: work
tools.purpose: JOBS hand: clock a pawn INTO a WorkClock job (haul/mend/stock/beacon/rites/barter/guard LIVE) . READ shows the catalog + each pawn's current job + accrued time. Clock-in is a real owner tx (DRY until --execute AND CITIZEN_ALLOW_LIVE=1). FISHING is LIVE but uses the `fish` tool (ocean-LP swap, not a clock-in) → work redirects to it. log/mill/crab are PLANNED → it REFUSES + flags the founder-gated mechanic (never fakes). CRABBING is beach-gated honestly.

tools.name: build
tools.purpose: BUILD mechanic (founder design: pay GOLD → StructureFactory mints a structure NFT w/ its OWN WaterV2 endowment → it produces lumber/food + RE-LOCKS gold as endowment). list = buildable + existing. plan = price + gate on GOLD exit-liquidity; if StructureFactory is deployed (deploy/structure-factory-deployment.json) + the kind is registered + gates pass + CITIZEN_ALLOW_LIVE=1, plan --execute BUILDS for real (exact gold approval, live minMoneyOut). Else reports the founder-gated deploy. Structure starts UNSEALED (reclaimable); seal() locks the endowment. Never fakes a build.

tools.name: build-ship
tools.cmd: node citizen/tools/build-ship.js [info | plan --name N --symbol S [--crew 1..100] [--captain id] | launch --name N --symbol S --crew C --execute | resume <token> --execute | phase <token>]
tools.purpose: SHIP-BUILD hand for trade routes. Launches a ship via the LIVE ShipyardV5 (0x6213104b) staged flow (beginLaunchFor→launchWalls→finishLaunch, each <16.5M gas). info reads fee+balance; plan designs+prices; launch fires all 3 steps (needs USDC fee + CITIZEN_ALLOW_LIVE=1); resume advances a partial launch. Result = bare trade-route ship (sail-rig+row-vault are a curator follow-on). Real-or-nothing — DRY until funded+live.

tools.name: tavern
tools.purpose: TAVERN: buy your pawn food & water — costs GOLD, restores/levels the pawn. Each round ≈ 100 GOLD = 1 feed+water = 1 level. Player pays GOLD only (the money plumbing underneath is hidden). Get the pawn id from pawns.js (myCrewIds). DRY by default (quotes the whole chain); live needs --execute AND CITIZEN_ALLOW_LIVE=1 + you must OWN the pawn. --target flow feeds the JOB-WAGE flow instead of the class level. The tavern serves while the membrane holds — stock is limited (a MEMBRANE GATE refuses when the Money LP can't cover the rounds or would drain below its $1 floor; DRY shows membrane.availableRounds so brains can plan). Hard cap $5 of GOLD per run; stops if the gold price is off.

tools.name: fish
tools.cmd: node citizen/tools/fish.js [loop | catch [--pawn d:t] | crab [--pawn d:t] | sell [--usd N]] [--execute]
tools.purpose: FISHING/CRABBING (skill + water-FLOW gated CATCH — NOT a market buy). loop = read flow-supply + WIS skill + projected catch + sell value. catch = skill-gated FISH harvest of the flow-produced supply (DESIGN/DRY — the on-chain catch dispenser is founder-gated/not built; market swap-buy FORBIDDEN+disabled). crab = SAME mechanic for crabs (planned: needs a CRAB water flow source; beach-gated). sell = sell CAUGHT fish dear at Port Royal (loc 8003, real buyer; LIVE-capable, location-gated, exact, CITIZEN_ALLOW_LIVE). Reusable harvest logic in citizen/lib/harvest.js. Real-or-nothing — never forges presence or a catch.

brain.purpose: Headless Claude agent PER bot profile (Citizen + brawler/worker/fisher/trader). Each tick: charter + journal + live state → claude picks ONE toolbelt action → run it → journal the outcome + a lesson (learning loop). NO API KEY — driven by the local `claude` CLI (subscription) in -p print mode; toolbelt presented as an action menu, claude's JSON choice parsed + executed.
brain.plan: --plan assembles + prints the prompt/menu/state WITHOUT calling claude (proves wiring offline)
brain.safety: DRY by default; --execute only passed when --live AND CITIZEN_ALLOW_LIVE=1; every tool also self-gates; tick failures journaled, never hidden
brain.profiles: citizen/brain/profiles.json (charter + walletEnv + keyName per profile); deckhand focus from deckhand-paths.json
brain.wallets: chain.js honors CITIZEN_WALLET_ENV + CITIZEN_KEY_NAME so one harness drives every profile's wallet
brain.pvpTodo: bot-vs-bot sparring + both-team on-chain verify is a LATER phase (hook left in deckhand-paths.json sparring) — NOT built yet

fallbackLoop.purpose: optional no-LLM paper-only safety net; the Claude agent harness (citizen/brain) is the real brain

env.CITIZEN_RPC: Base RPC (defaults to the project Alchemy endpoint)
env.SEAS_API_BASE: rules server base (prod https://tasern.quest/seas-api ; local http://localhost:8799)
env.CITIZEN_ALLOW_LIVE: set to 1 ONLY after funding + founder approval to permit real swaps
